block_00: Reliable broker = high level of trader confidence!
block_03: Unreliable brokers are a serious threat to traders since it can be hard to distinguish real brokers from scam ones. Dishonest brokers often promise big returns and bonuses to lure traders in and then steal data, withhold withdrawals and keep the trader’s money.
block_04: Be careful with these offers — they have nothing to do with us and may be fraught with the loss of your money. IQ Option is a broker with international regulations, which precisely prohibit the use of deposit bonuses in addition to cryptocurrencies.
block_05: It is important to stay away from suspicious brokers.
block_06: In order to tell an honest broker from a scammer, you may do the following:
block_07: Look for regulation information on the broker’s website. A reliable broker should state all the official information in free access.
block_08: For example, IQ Option offers this information on the
block_10: Check if a warning was issued to the broker on the CVM website
block_12: . This will give you an idea whether the broker you are choosing is compliant with the regulatory requirements of your country or not.
block_13: For example, IQ Option had some warnings, and we worked on this, and now we don't have any restrictions. IQ Option is authorized to provide services in Brazil, as no warnings are issued to the broker.
block_15: Pay attention to the deposit and verification procedures the broker offers. If the verification procedure is too simple or non-existent, while the broker is pushing you to deposit, it is a suspicious signal.
block_16: Choose well-known brokers with a long history of operation. Try to avoid companies that provide little to no information about themselves and have no contact details.
